title: Multi-Head Attention
content:
# Multi-Head Attention

## 1. Architectural Equation
$$\text{head}_i = \operatorname{Attention}(\mathbf{Q}\mathbf{W}_i^Q, \mathbf{K}\mathbf{W}_i^K, \mathbf{V}\mathbf{W}_i^V)$$
$$\text{Output} = \operatorname{Concat}(\text{head}_1, \dots, \text{head}_h)\mathbf{W}^O$$

## 2. Projection Dimensions
*   $d_k = d_{\text{model}} / h$
*   Keeps computational cost equivalent to single-head attention.
